case_for: Wilson has hit or exceeded the 12-point threshold in four of his last six games, including a 26.9-point explosion and a 16.0-point outing, showing his ceiling as a starter with big-play upside is legitimate.
case_against: His volatility is stark with two sub-9 point duds (6.3 and 8.4) in the last six weeks, meaning a poor floor game remains a real risk in any given week.
